_comment: Real sample response captured from GET https://eyewire.org/1.0/player/{username}/stats (2026-06-21). The endpoint sends 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *', so direct browser fetch works without a proxy. NOTE: an unknown player returns HTTP 200 with "id": null (not a 404). Numeric values may arrive as strings ('forever' block) or numbers (day/week/month).
